hooks.command: git diff --name-only HEAD | while read f; do test -f "$f" || echo "WARNING: Missing staged file: $f"; done 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(gd|tscn)$' && godot --headless --script res://tests/validate.gd 2>&1 | grep -E '(FAIL|RESULT)' || true
